title: Architectural Innovation
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: Modern architecture is often criticized for its (0) coldness and lack of character. However, new (17) are challenging this view by integrating nature into their designs. This (18) of organic elements into concrete structures is known as biophilic design. || The (19) of these buildings often depends on the use of sustainable materials. To (20) the structure against extreme weather, innovative techniques are employed. The (21) of the building's facade can also (22) its energy efficiency. Critics often point out the (23) of such projects, yet their (24) impact on urban well-being is undeniable.

questions.explanation: Plural agent noun for people with original ideas.
